# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    parameters {
        choice(
            name: 'DEPLOY_ENV',
            choices: ['staging', 'production'],
            description: 'Select deployment environment'
        )
        string(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_URLS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Comma-separated list of artifact URLs'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DEPLOY_SERVERS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Comma-separated list of deployment servers'
        )
    }
    environment {
        ARTIFACT_DIR = "${WORKSPACE}/artifacts"
        DEPLOY_USER = 'deploy'
        SECRET_TOKEN = "${credentials('deploy-token')}"
    }
    stages {
        stage('Validate Inputs') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (params.ARTIFACT_URLS == null || params.ARTIFACT_URLS.trim() == '') {
                        error "Artifact URLs parameter is required"
                    }
                    if (params.DEPLOY_SERVERS == null || params.DEPLOY_SERVERS.trim() == '') {
                        error "Deployment servers parameter is required"
                    }
                    def urls = params.ARTIFACT_URLS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }
                    def servers = params.DEPLOY_SERVERS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }
                    
                    // Validate URLs against allowlist
                    def allowedDomains = ['s3.amazonaws.com', 'artifactory.company.com', 'repo.company.com']
                    for (url in urls) {
                        def isValid = false
                        for (domain in allowedDomains) {
                            if (url.contains(domain)) {
                                isValid = true
                                break
                            }
                        }
                        if (!isValid) {
                            error "URL not in allowed domains: ${url}"
                        }
                    }
                    
                    // Validate server names
                    def allowedServers = ['prod-web-01.company.com', 'prod-web-02.company.com']
                    for (server in servers) {
                        if (!allowedServers.contains(server)) {
                            error "Server not in allowed list: ${server}"
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Download Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    mkdir "${ARTIFACT_DIR}"
                    def urls = params.ARTIFACT_URLS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }
                    for (url in urls) {
                        withCredentials([usernamePassword(credentialsId: 'artifactory-credentials', 
                                                        usernameVariable: 'ARTIFACTORY_USER', 
                                                        passwordVariable: 'ARTIFACTORY_PASS')]) {
                            sh """
                                curl -u \${ARTIFACTORY_USER}:\${ARTIFACTORY_PASS} \\
                                     -H 'Authorization: Bearer \${SECRET_TOKEN}' \\
                                     -L -o ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/\$(basename ${url}) \\
                                     ${url}
                            """
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Deploy Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = params.DEPLOY_SERVERS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }
                    def artifacts = findFiles(glob: "${ARTIFACT_DIR}/*").collect { it.name }
                    
                    for (server in servers) {
                        withCredentials([sshUserPrivateKey(credentialsId: 'deploy-key',
                                                         keyFileVariable: 'SSH_KEY',
                                                         usernameVariable: 'DEPLOY_USER')]) {
                            sh """
                                scp -i \${SSH_KEY} \\
                                    -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no \\
                                    ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/* \\
                                    \${DEPLOY_USER}@${server}:/opt/app/deploy/
                            """
                        }
                        sh """
                            ssh -i \${SSH_KEY} \\
                                -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no \\
                                \${DEPLOY_USER}@${server} \\
                                'cd /opt/app/deploy && \\
                                chmod +x *.sh && \\
                                ./deploy.sh'
                        """
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    post {
        always {
            cleanWs()
        }
        success {
            slackSend channel: '#deployments', 
                     message: "Deployment successful to ${params.DEPLOY_ENV} environment"
        }
        failure {
            slackSend channel: '#deployments', 
                     message: "Deployment failed to ${params.DEPLOY_ENV} environment"
        }
    }
}
